section_summaries.Colorado: This week’s 48 articles focus on supply pipeline, LIHTC/tax credits, and financing & rates. These stories track LIHTC award cycles, municipal affordability ordinances, and local housing developments that directly shape supply and cost-burden for Colorado renters and buyers.
section_summaries.Western Slope: This week’s 101 articles focus on supply pipeline, costs & insurance, and policy & zoning. Coverage highlights workforce-housing shortages, resort-market price pressures, and rural development challenges that make affordability especially acute in mountain communities.
section_summaries.National: This week’s 157 articles focus on rent pressure, LIHTC/tax credits, and policy & zoning. Coverage monitors federal housing-finance policy, LIHTC program updates, construction-cost trends, and macroeconomic signals — interest rates, insurance premiums, and supply-chain pressures — that ripple through every local affordable housing market.

signals_explain: Signal counts are keyword-based and measured across all fetched articles for this week.
